Description:
Ballistics of the 76x385mm UOF-354M, UOF-354AM with the OF-350 HE-Frag shell fired from the 76mm divisional gun M1942 (ZiS-3). Produced in China as the WB022P HE-Frag round fired from the Type 54 76mm cannon along the pattern 52-P-354U.

Fires a 6.2 kg shell with 1.08 kg of 9/7 Pyroxylin charge to 680 m/s, developing 2380 kgf/cm^2. Gun length is 3466mm (inclusive of muzzle device, breech block, etc), tube is 2985mm long, chamber measures 398mm from breech to the start of rifling. From interior ballistics manual, propellant volume is 1.484 L, measures 298 mm long, projectile travel is 2687 mm. Pressure is copper crusher gauge, converts to piezoelectric at a factor of 0.09806 x 1.12.

References:
- 《火炮内弹道计算手册》王连荣，张佩勤，国防工业出版社，1987
- 《国产火炮手册》兵器工业部第二管理局，1982
- 76-мм пушка, обр. 1942 г. Руководство службы. Издание третье. Орден Труда Красного Знамени Военное издательство министерства обороны СССР. Москва, 1971.
